creator: ds@ukrhub.net
text:
Russian translation of the chapter 'filesystems' in the handbook is available
outside the FreeBSD Documentation Project. Please, insert it into FDP.

Fix: 

Fetch http://chaos.ukrhub.net/filesystems/filesystems.tbz, unpack files
and put them to the appropriate directories.
  A patch 'handbook.add.fs.diff' may be used to modify Makefile, chapters.ent
and book.sgml.
How-To-Repeat:   Just check the doc repository.
